triggers.description: Whenever a Bat you control attacks, you gain 1 life.

Whenever NICKNAME enters or attacks, you may pay {W}{B} and 2 life. When you do, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it.
